title: Alchemical Sunset over the Hudson
caption: The setting sun igniting glass tower facades into sheets of liquid amber.
story: During winter solstice twilight, the low sun hits the glass facades of Midtown at an exact 45-degree angle, transforming concrete structures into glowing ingots of amber light.
curatorNote: Warm golden tones complement the dark magical library aesthetic nicely.
altText: City skyline reflecting warm golden sunset light across water.
